config.anemos.gamma.def.desc: The value which will be used to fallback if no value is found
config.anemos.gamma.val.desc: The gamma value that you want to toggle
config.anemos.gamma.transition.desc: Whether you want to enable transition or not
config.anemos.gamma.transitionTime.desc: The time that the transition will take (in Ticks, 20 ticks = 1 second)
config.anemos.fakeNightVision.enabled.de: Enable or Disable Fake 'Night Vision' effect
config.anemos.fakeNightVision.transition: Whether you want to enable transition or not
The time that the transition will take (in Ticks, 20 ticks = 1 second)
config.anemos.removeBlindness.transition: Whether you want to enable transition or not
The time that the transition will take (in Ticks, 20 ticks = 1 second)
Whether you want to enable transition or not
config.anemos.removeDarkness.transitionT: The time that the transition will take (in Ticks, 20 ticks = 1 second)
